positive: A stylized, minimalist abstract rendition of a roaring cosmic wolf silhouette, depicted in a blend of deep sapphire blue, luminous nebula purples, and shimmering gold constellations. The wolf is centered, depicted mid-howl, capturing dynamic energy and ethereal mystery. The background is a clean, deep void with subtle, repeating geometric patterns suggesting star maps. Strong, high-contrast lighting emanates from behind the wolf's form, giving it a powerful, iconic, graphic quality. Clean vector lines, flat graphic design aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, high contrast, clean silhouette, central composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, fuzzy, grainy, amateur, blurry
